meta_description: PCBWay sets the bar high for manufacturing standards and our factories are ISO-9001 certified. Professional inspection department conducts testing and inspection, including CMM inspection, FAI, material certification, etc.

sections.heading: Persistently Adhere to Stringent Quality Control
sections.text: Persistently Adhere to Stringent Quality Control Prototype in as fast as 2 days Tight tolerance control into +/- 0.01mm ISO9001:2015, IATF16949:2016 certification Get intant quote

sections.heading: PCBWay's Quality Control Measures
sections.text: PCBWay's Quality Control Measures PCBWay focus on producing high-quality products that meet or exceed customers’ expectations. Quality Control Solutions Quality Control We maintain high-quality standards through careful partner selection, top-notch materials, and adherence to international standards. Customer Satisfaction We value customer feedback and continuously strive to enhance our services and products, ensuring exceptional customer experiences. Supply Chain Reliability We closely monitor all partners involved in production and delivery to ensure a dependable supply chain, enabling timely project completion and meeting customers' supply needs.

sections.heading: PCBWay’s Manufacturing Standards
sections.text: PCBWay’s Manufacturing Standards CNC Machining standards 3D Printing standards Sheet Metal standards Injection Molding standards Vacuum Casting standards

sections.heading: CNC Machining standards
sections.text: CNC Machining standards We will adhere to ISO 2768-1 standards to control tolerances. In cases where tighter tolerances are required, a technical drawing will be necessary to indicate critical dimensions. 3, 4 and 5-axis milling CNC Turning Electrical Discharge Machining CNC Machining parameter standard Limits for nominal size Plastics Coarse class (c) Metals Medium class (m) 0.5mm* to 3mm ±0.2mm ±0.1mm 3mm to 6mm ±0.3mm ±0.1mm 6mm to 30mm ±0.5mm ±0.2mm 30mm to 120mm ±0.8mm ±0.3mm 120mm to 400mm ±1.2mm ±0.5mm 400mm to 1000mm ±2.Omm ±0.8mm 1000mm to 2000mm ±3.0mm ±1.2mm 2000mm to 4000mm ±4.Omm ±2.0mm

sections.heading: 3D Printing standards
sections.text: 3D Printing standards Our 3D printing capability allows for a maximum equipment size of 2100*700*800mm. The specific printing tolerance is determined by the chosen printing technologies. Please refer to the table below for detailed information on the respective tolerances. Stereolithography (SLA) Selective Laser Sintering (SLS) Digital Light Processing (DLP) Fused Deposition Modeling (FDM) Selective Laser Melting (SLM) Multi Jet Fusion (MJF) 3D Printing parameter standard Process Tolerance SLA L<100mm,±0.2mm. l>100mm,±0.2%*L(mm) DLP L<100mm,±0.1mm. l>100mm,±0.1%*L(mm) SLS L<100mm,±0.25mm. 100< L<200mm,±0.3mm 200< L<500mm,±0.5mm. L>500mm,±0.1%*L(mm) MJF L<100mm,±0.25mm. l>100mm,±0.25%*L(mm)...

sections.heading: PCBWay’s Quality Control Standard
sections.text: PCBWay’s Quality Control Standard PCBWay ensures top-notch quality standards from material selection to final inspection. Preliminary Document Assessment Stringent Material Quality Control Advanced Manufacturing Machinery Continuous Quality Monitoring Final Product Evaluation Thorough Oversight Our engineering team evaluates your part design for accuracy and compliance. We prioritize structural integrity and meticulous workmanship. We analyze the selected materials and surface finish requirements. We use top-quality materials and closely monitor our suppliers. Requested material certifications provide detailed information and come directly from raw material manufacturers. We prioritize tran...

sections.heading: From Prototyping to Production
sections.text: From Prototyping to Production PCBWay upholds top-notch quality standards from material selection to final inspection in our production process. Rapid Prototyping With our instant quoting and strong capacity, expect prototypes in short lead times. Strict Production Bridge the gap between design and product rollout seamlessly. On-Demand Manufacturing Our full-service ensures high precision and quality products on demand.

sections.heading: Quality Certifications
sections.text: Quality Certifications PCBWay's quality management system is ISO 9001:2015 certified. We also have manufacturing partners in our ecosystem with the following certifications: ISO 9001:2015 IATF 16949:2016 ISO 13485 PCBWay offers certifications for your orders including: Standard Inspection with Formal Report CMM Inspection with Formal Report Source Material Certification

sections.heading: Resolving Quality Concerns for You
sections.text: Resolving Quality Concerns for You If your order does not meet your specifications, we offer options for rework or refund. Should you encounter any quality issues within one month of receiving your goods, please reach out to our experts. Notify us of the issue within five business days of receipt, and we will promptly address it within 1 to 3 business days. Rework Upon receiving a complaint, we thoroughly examine the design and samples to identify any discrepancies. We promptly address the complaint and initiate immediate rework as necessary. Unacceptable processing defects Does not meet tolerance requirements Incorrect material/finish Refund Quickly process refunds after confirming product...
